features.description: Fix: Lyric share buttons invisible on touch/mobile (Round 4 #3). In components/SyncedLyrics.tsx, the share button per lyric line uses `opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-60` — this means on mobile (no hover) the buttons are permanently invisible. FIX: Change to `opacity-40 sm:opacity-0 sm:group-hover:opacity-60` so on mobile they're always slightly visible, on desktop they appear on hover. Also increase the tap target: change `p-1.5` to `p-2` on the share button. DONE: Lyric share buttons visible on mobile at reduced opacity. DO NOT TOUCH: annotation toggle behavior, lyric parsing. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Fix share button opacity for mobile

features.description: Fix: Sort pills overflow on /songs page at 320px (Round 4 #4). In app/songs/page.tsx, the sort pills are in a `flex gap-2` container without wrapping. On narrow screens they overflow. FIX: Add `flex-wrap` to the sort pills container div. Also reduce padding on pills for mobile: change `px-4 py-1.5` to `px-3 py-1 sm:px-4 sm:py-1.5`. DONE: Sort pills wrap on narrow screens. DO NOT TOUCH: sort logic, track rendering. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add flex-wrap to sort pills container

features.description: Fix: NowPlayingBar controls too small for touch (Round 4 #5). In components/NowPlayingBar.tsx, skip buttons and share button have tap targets under 44px. FIX: (1) Wrap each skip button in a div with `min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] flex items-center justify-center` to create a 44px touch target while keeping the icon small. (2) Do the same for the share button. (3) Increase play/pause button from `w-9 h-9` to `w-10 h-10` on mobile: `w-10 h-10 sm:w-9 sm:h-9`. DONE: All NowPlayingBar controls meet 44px minimum tap target. DO NOT TOUCH: audio logic, progress bar. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add 44px touch targets to skip buttons

features.description: Fix: Bottom padding mismatch when Up Next banner shows (Round 4). In app/layout.tsx, the content has `pb-[72px]` to account for NowPlayingBar. But when the Up Next countdown banner appears, it adds ~40px, hiding the last item in lists. FIX: Increase bottom padding to `pb-[120px]` to safely accommodate both the NowPlayingBar and the Up Next banner. This adds extra space but prevents content from being hidden behind the bar. DONE: Content never hidden behind NowPlayingBar + Up Next. DO NOT TOUCH: NowPlayingBar component. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix: Search clear X button too small for touch (Round 4 touch targets). In app/page.tsx and app/songs/page.tsx, the search clear (X) button is ~16px. FIX: In both files, wrap the X icon in a larger touch target: change the button to have `p-2` instead of just the icon. The X icon stays small (w-4 h-4) but the button padding creates a 44px+ tap target. DONE: Search clear buttons are easily tappable. DO NOT TOUCH: search logic. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Read app/page.tsx — fix search clear button
Read app/songs/page.tsx — fix search clear button

features.description: Add prominent share CTA on track detail page (Round 2 Judge #3). The track page has no visible share dropdown — sharing is only in VoteButtons (small icon) and NowPlayingBar. FIX: In app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx, in the 'Vote + Share' section at the bottom (around the VoteButtons area), add a visible 'Share This Song' button with a dropdown menu showing: Share to X, Share to LinkedIn, Copy Link. Style: `inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium border border-border/50 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:border-border transition-colors`. Use the same share handlers already in the file (handleShareX, handleShareLinkedIn, handleCopyLink). Add a useState for dropdown open/close and AnimatePresence for animation. DONE: Track page has a visible Share button with social options. DO NOT TOUCH: audio controls, lyrics section. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add Share dropdown in the Vote+Share section

features.description: Fix: 'Do Things That Don't Scale' Brian Chesky quote attribution (Round 3 Lenny). The keyQuote 'Go to your users. Physically go to them' is attributed to Brian Chesky but is more of a Paul Graham / YC maxim. Chesky lived it but didn't coin it. FIX: Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to find what Brian Chesky actually said on Lenny's podcast about doing things that don't scale. Update the keyQuote to an actual Chesky quote from the episode. If you can find a better direct quote, use it. If not, change the attribution to be more accurate: 'Inspired by Brian Chesky's Airbnb story' rather than a direct quote. Update in lib/albums.ts — find the track with slug 'do-things-that-dont-scale'. DONE: Quote attribution is accurate. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Search Lenny MCP for Chesky on doing things that don't scale

features.description: Fix: Progress bar too thin for mobile tap (Round 4). In app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx and components/NowPlayingBar.tsx, the progress bar is 6px tall with a hover tooltip. On mobile, 6px is nearly impossible to tap accurately. FIX: In TrackPageClient.tsx, change the progress bar container padding from `py-2 -my-2` to `py-3 -my-3` to increase the tap target zone. The visual bar stays 6px but the clickable area is larger. Same fix in NowPlayingBar.tsx — increase `py-1.5 -mb-1.5` to `py-3 -mb-3`. DONE: Progress bars are tappable on mobile. DO NOT TOUCH: seek logic. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Read TrackPageClient.tsx — increase progress bar tap area

features.description: Fix: Annotation toggle (BookOpen) and onboarding dismiss (X) touch targets (Round 4). In components/SyncedLyrics.tsx, the annotation toggle button has `p-1.5` making it ~26px — too small. Change to `p-2.5` for a 44px target. In components/OnboardingTooltips.tsx, the dismiss X button is tiny. Add `p-2` padding. DONE: Both buttons meet 44px tap target. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix: Keyboard shortcuts ? button should not show on mobile (Round 4). In components/KeyboardShortcuts.tsx, the ? button shows on all screens. But mobile has no keyboard, so this button is confusing. FIX: Add `hidden sm:flex` to the ? button so it only appears on desktop/tablet screens where keyboard shortcuts are usable. DONE: ? button hidden on mobile. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Verify Round 3 Lenny accuracy: spot-check 5 more tracks. The Lenny audit only checked 5 tracks. Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to verify 5 MORE tracks chosen from different albums: (1) 'crossing-the-chasm' (Growth Engine), (2) 'the-hiring-playbook' (Talent Search), (3) 'burnout' (Human Side), (4) 'plg' (Growth Engine), (5) 'the-obsession' (By the Numbers). For each: verify the guest actually appeared on Lenny's podcast, the keyQuote is real, the concept is correctly attributed. Write findings to content/qa/round5-accuracy-spotcheck.md. DONE: Spot-check exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix any accuracy issues from Round 5 spot-check. Read content/qa/round5-accuracy-spotcheck.md. Fix any incorrect attributions, wrong quotes, or mismatched sources in lib/albums.ts. Use Lenny MCP to verify corrections. DONE: Issues fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Round 2 Judge recommendation: Add 'curated for you' / 'start here' flow (from What Would Make This Unbeatable). The judge suggested a way for first-time visitors to know which of 100+ songs to try first. FIX: On the homepage (app/page.tsx), add a 'Start Here' or 'Editor's Picks' section ABOVE the Popular section. Show 3 tracks with a brief one-line description of why each is a must-listen. Pick the 3 most impressive/accessible tracks. Use a different visual treatment — slightly larger cards or a highlight border. Add a small heading: 'New here? Start with these'. DONE: Start here section exists on homepage above Popular. DO NOT TOUCH: Popular section logic, album grid. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add Start Here section above Popular

features.description: Verify all source URLs are valid. Read lib/albums.ts. For every track, check if sources[].url looks like a real Lenny URL (should be https://www.lennysnewsletter.com/p/ or similar). Flag any that look fabricated (random slugs) or are empty. Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to find correct URLs where possible. Write content/qa/url-audit.md listing problematic URLs. DONE: URL audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix broken/fabricated URLs from URL audit. Read content/qa/url-audit.md. Fix each flagged URL in lib/albums.ts. Use MCP to find correct URLs. Set empty string if URL can't be found (better than a broken link). DONE: URLs fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix multi-guest attribution: many songs draw from multiple Lenny guests but only show one quoteSpeaker. Read lib/albums.ts. For EVERY track, check if the lyrics, concept, annotations, or keyInsight reference multiple guests/episodes. If a track draws from 2+ guests but only has 1 source in the sources array, add the missing sources. If quoteSpeaker attributes a composite insight to just one person, either: (a) change quoteSpeaker to the most accurate single person, or (b) change the keyQuote to one that IS from that specific person, verified via mcp__lennysdata__search_content. Common pattern: 'Taste' draws from Shreyas Doshi, Brian Chesky, and Scott Belsky — it already has 2 sources but annotations reference Belsky too. Ensure sources array covers all referenced guests. Check at minimum these tracks known to reference multiple guests: taste, do-things-that-dont-scale, im-in-the-room, build-the-machine, ship-it, product-market-fit, the-maze, eleven-stars, vibe-coding. For each, read the lyrics and annotations, identify all guests mentioned, and ensure the sources array includes them all with correct titles, types, URLs (use MCP to find), and guest names. DONE: All multi-guest tracks have complete sources arrays. No guest is referenced in lyrics/annotations but missing from sources. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Use Lenny MCP to find missing source URLs
Add missing sources to each track
